surfaced.title: Financial stability vulnerabilities remain elevated as geoeconomic shock unfolds
surfaced.relevance: ECB explicit warning on systemic vulnerabilities during geoeconomic stress; critical for credit-equity dislocation monitoring in elevated-risk regime.

surfaced.title: Swiss National Bank cuts interest rates by a half point to 0.5%
surfaced.relevance: Central bank easing decision with direct credit and liquidity implications during elevated geoeconomic stress backdrop.

surfaced.title: Fed's Powell says rate cut 'on the table' as soon as September
surfaced.relevance: Forward guidance signalling potential Fed easing; tests thesis that credit markets may be underpricing recession risk if cuts arrive.

surfaced.title: Federal Reserve Board announces termination of enforcement actions with UBS Group AG, Credit Suisse AG, Credit Suisse Holdings (USA), Inc., and Credit Suisse AG, New York Branch
surfaced.relevance: Termination of Credit Suisse enforcement actions signals regulatory confidence in systemic stress resolution and banking stability post-crisis.

surfaced.title: Partners Group Is First Private Equity Fund To Gate Investors
surfaced.relevance: Private equity redemption gates and liquidity restrictions indicate emerging funding market stress not yet visible in credit spreads.

surfaced.title: Blackstone's Private Credit Fund Joins Peers In Gating Investors After Surge In Redemptions
surfaced.relevance: Private credit fund gating signals emerging funding market stress and potential credit dislocation not yet priced in calm credit spreads.

surfaced.title: Korea "Black Monday": Kospi Halted For 20 Minutes After Crashing Almost 10%
surfaced.relevance: Equity stress (Kospi -8.8%) without matching credit market dislocation signals potential regime shift requiring confirmation from credit spreads.

surfaced.title: SoftBank Attempt To Get Downsized $6 Billion OpenAi Margin Loan Stalls
surfaced.relevance: Funding market stress: major creditor hesitation on margin loan backed by tech mega-cap collateral signals early credit dislocation.

surfaced.title: Ugly, Tailing 30Y Auction Sees Foreign Demand Tumble, Dealer "Backtop" Bid Jump
surfaced.relevance: US Treasury auction deterioration signals emerging funding market stress not yet visible in credit spreads at 274bp.

surfaced.title: Bank Of Japan Raises Rates To 1% For The First Time In 31 Years, Will Stop Reducing Bond Purchases
surfaced.relevance: BoJ rate hike to 1% and halt of QT signals major central bank policy shift with direct implications for global credit conditions and funding markets.

surfaced.title: US Housing Starts Collapsed In May To Lowest Since COVID
surfaced.relevance: Housing starts crash 15.4% MoM to COVID lows signals recession risk; test whether credit markets price this real economy deterioration or remain complacent.

surfaced.title: Federal Reserve issues FOMC statement
surfaced.relevance: New Fed Chair Warsh's first policy decision; signals potential shift in rate path and credit conditions under new leadership.

surfaced.title: Federal Reserve Board and Federal Open Market Committee release economic projections from the June 16-17 FOMC meeting
surfaced.relevance: Fed's forward projections on rates, growth, inflation inform market expectations of near-term easing and recession risk pricing in credit.

surfaced.title: "Radical Earnings Cut": JPMorgan Sounds Alarm After BMW's Forecast Shock
surfaced.relevance: Major corporates cutting guidance sharply (BMW margin 6% to 1%); tests whether credit spreads price deteriorating earnings and China weakness.

surfaced.title: Federal Reserve Board announces that results from its annual bank stress test will be released on Wednesday, June 24, at 4 p.m. EDT.
surfaced.relevance: Stress test results under new Fed Chair Warsh will signal bank capital adequacy and credit resilience amid housing crash and geoeconomic stress.

surfaced.title: Apollo Gates Private Credit Investors For 2nd Quarter As 17% Rush To The Exits
surfaced.relevance: Private credit fund gating signals emerging funding market stress and potential credit dislocation not yet reflected in calm HY OAS at 259bp.

surfaced.title: Federal Reserve Board's annual bank stress test confirms that large banks are well positioned to weather a severe recession and able to continue to lend to households and businesses
surfaced.relevance: Bank stress test results under new Fed Chair Warsh signal capital adequacy and credit resilience amid housing crash and geoeconomic stress.
